title: Fluffy Nutty British Sausages Bangers and Mash
description: A one-pot British dish featuring nutty and fluffy sausages with a hint of tamarind paste. Perfect for a quick and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: British sausages
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-protein sausage such as pork and lamb

instructions: Heat butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add in the sausages and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add chicken stock, unbleached all-purpose flour, milk, and tamarind paste to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add in the brined salt and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a sprinkle of all-purpose flour.
Cooking time may vary depending on sausage size and type.
